description_long: This object is a medium-sized fixed-blade knife with a straight, single-edged blade and a gently curved wooden handle. The blade appears to be made of polished steel, with a subtle taper towards the tip and a flat spine. The handle is crafted from a reddish-brown wood, featuring a smooth, ergonomic contour that fits comfortably in the hand, and is accented by a brass bolster at the junction with the blade. Accompanying the knife is a matching wooden sheath, designed to securely encase the blade when not in use. The sheath shares the same wood grain and coloration as the handle, with a slightly flared end for easy insertion and removal. The overall design is utilitarian yet elegant, suitable for both display and practical use.
description: A straight-edged steel knife with a curved wooden handle and a matching wooden sheath, featuring brass accents and a smooth, polished finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the knife and sheath, highlighting the straight blade, curved wooden handle, and matching sheath.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the narrow profile of the blade and handle, as well as the thickness and shape of the sheath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, emphasizing the blade's edge and the wood grain on both handle and sheath.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the rounded end of the handle and sheath, and the alignment of the blade with the sheath.
attribute_handle_design: curved, polished wood, ergonomic, brass bolster
